# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/build-py310
# It was generated by CMake: /opt/homebrew/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Path to a library.
AMD_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/libamd.dylib

//Build the testing tree.
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Boost.
Boost_DIR:PATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/cmake/Boost-1.90.0

Boost_FILESYSTEM_LIBRARY_RELEASE:STRING=/opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem.dylib

//Path to a file.
Boost_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/opt/homebrew/include

Boost_PROGRAM_OPTIONS_LIBRARY_RELEASE:STRING=/opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_program_options.dylib

//Path to a library.
CAMD_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/libcamd.dylib

//Build documentation examples
CATCH_BUILD_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Build extra tests
CATCH_BUILD_EXTRA_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Builds static library from the main implementation. EXPERIMENTAL
CATCH_BUILD_STATIC_LIBRARY:BOOL=OFF

//Build SelfTest project
CATCH_BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//Generate coverage for codecov.io
CATCH_ENABLE_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable all warnings as errors
CATCH_ENABLE_WERROR:BOOL=ON

//Install documentation alongside library
CATCH_INSTALL_DOCS:BOOL=ON

//Install contrib alongside library
CATCH_INSTALL_HELPERS:BOOL=ON

//Perform SelfTests with Valgrind
CATCH_USE_VALGRIND:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a library.
CCOLAMD_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/libccolamd.dylib

//Path to a file.
CHOLMOD_INCLUDES:PATH=/opt/homebrew/include/suitesparse

//Path to a library.
CHOLMOD_LIBRARIES:FILEPATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/libcholmod.dylib

//Path to a library.
CHOLMOD_METIS_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=CHOLMOD_METIS_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build. Options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel RelWithAssert
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=RelWithAssert

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used during native debug builds
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUGNATIVE:STRING=-g -march=native

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used during native release builds
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASENATIVE:STRING=-O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG

//Flags used during RelWithAssertions builds
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHASSERT:STRING=-O3

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used during native debug builds
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUGNATIVE:STRING=-g -march=native

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used during native release builds
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASENATIVE:STRING=-O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG

//Flags used during RelWithAssertions builds
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHASSERT:STRING=-O3

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used during native debug builds
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUGNATIVE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHASSERT:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/build-py310/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_INSTALL_NAME_TOOL:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/install_name_tool

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LIBTOOL:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/libtool

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ld

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/make

CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

CMAKE_TAPI:FILEPATH=/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/tapi

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

COLAMD_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/libcolamd.dylib

// inspection
COVERAGE_COMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcov

//How long to wait between timed-out CTest submissions.
CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_DELAY:STRING=5

Eigen3_DIR:PATH=Eigen3_DIR-NOTFOUND

FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=/Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/build-py310/_deps

FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Disable Copyleft libraries
LIBIGL_WITHOUT_COPYLEFT:BOOL=OFF

//Use CGAL
LIBIGL_WITH_CGAL:BOOL=OFF

//Use CoMiso
LIBIGL_WITH_COMISO:BOOL=OFF

//Use Cork
LIBIGL_WITH_CORK:BOOL=OFF

//Use Embree
LIBIGL_WITH_EMBREE:BOOL=OFF

//Use Matlab
LIBIGL_WITH_MATLAB:BOOL=OFF

//Use MOSEK

//Use OpenGL

//Use ImGui

//Use PNG

//Use Python

//Use Tetgen
LIBIGL_WITH_TETGEN:BOOL=OFF

//Use Triangle
LIBIGL_WITH_TRIANGLE:BOOL=OFF

//Use XML
LIBIGL_WITH_XML:BOOL=OFF

//Command to build the project
MAKECOMMAND:STRING=/opt/homebrew/bin/cmake --build . --config "${CTEST_CONFIGURATION_TYPE}"

//Path to the memory checking command, used for memory error detection.
MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND:FILEPATH=MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND-NOTFOUND

//File that contains suppressions for the memory checker
MEMORYCHECK_SUPPRESSIONS_FILE:FILEPATH=

//Also bind the long-double FEMMesh instantiations
MESHFEM_BIND_LONG_DOUBLE:BOOL=OFF

//Build executable programs
MESHFEM_BUILD_BINARIES:BOOL=OFF

//Build python bindings
MESHFEM_BUILD_PYTHON_BINDINGS:BOOL=ON

//Don't use GCC's new C++11 ABI; needed to prevent linker errors
// with libraries compiled with the old ABI
MESHFEM_DISABLE_CXX11_ABI_GCC:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the benchmarking code
MESHFEM_ENABLE_BENCHMARKING:BOOL=ON

//Force /Z7 option on MSVC
MESHFEM_FORCE_Z7:BOOL=OFF

//Do not build a local version of Ceres if one is already found
// on the system
MESHFEM_PREFER_SYSTEM_CERES:BOOL=ON

//Add march=native and ffast-math flags to encourage generation
// of SIMD instructions. These options will propagate to code linking
// against MeshFEM
MESHFEM_VECTORIZE:BOOL=OFF

//Compile MeshFEM with Ceres
MESHFEM_WITH_CERES:BOOL=OFF

//Build the offscreen renderer (Requires GLEW/OpenGL or OSMesa)
MESHFEM_WITH_OFFSCREEN_RENDER:BOOL=ON

//Compile MeshFEM with TBB support
MESHFEM_WITH_TBB:BOOL=ON

//Compile MeshFEM with UMFPACK for LU factorization (GPL licensed)
MESHFEM_WITH_UMFPACK:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a library.
SUITESPARSE_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=SUITESPARSE_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Build TBB Python bindings
TBB_BUILD_PYTHON:BOOL=OFF

//Build TBB shared library
TBB_BUILD_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//Build TBB static library
TBB_BUILD_STATIC:BOOL=OFF

//Build TBB malloc library
TBB_BUILD_TBBMALLOC:BOOL=ON

//Build TBB malloc proxy library
TBB_BUILD_TBBMALLOC_PROXY:BOOL=OFF

//Build TBB tests and enable testing infrastructure
TBB_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//First time that TBB was configured
TBB_CONFIG_DATE:STRING=Sat, 13 Jun 2026 13:58:13 +0900

//Include build targets for 'make install'
TBB_INSTALL_TARGETS:BOOL=ON

//Do not save the configure date in the version string
TBB_NO_DATE:BOOL=OFF

//Set the SOVERSION (shared library build version suffix)?
TBB_SET_SOVERSION:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a file.
UMFPACK_INCLUDES:PATH=/opt/homebrew/include/suitesparse

//Path to a library.
UMFPACK_LIBRARIES:FILEPATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/libumfpack.dylib

//Use the software rasterization library OSMesa instead of a GPU-accelerated
// EGL/CGL context
USE_OSMESA:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a file.
ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/include

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd

boost_atomic_DIR:PATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/cmake/boost_atomic-1.90.0

boost_container_DIR:PATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/cmake/boost_container-1.90.0

boost_filesystem_DIR:PATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/cmake/boost_filesystem-1.90.0

boost_program_options_DIR:PATH=/opt/homebrew/lib/cmake/boost_program_options-1.90.0

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_AR
CMAKE_AR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

//ADVANCED property for variable: SUITESPARSE_LIBRARY
SUITESPARSE_LIBRARY-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Test SUPPORTS_MRTM
SUPPORTS_MRTM:INTERNAL=
//ADVANCED property for variable: UMFPACK_INCLUDES
UMFPACK_INCLUDES-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: UMFPACK_LIBRARIES
UMFPACK_LIBRARIES-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR
ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG
ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZLIB_LIBRARY_RELEASE
ZLIB_LIBRARY_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Catch2 full path to CatchAddTests.cmake helper file
_CATCH_DISCOVER_TESTS_SCRIPT:INTERNAL=/Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/3rdparty/MeshFEM/3rdparty/Catch2/contrib/CatchAddTests.cmake
//CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX during last run
_GNUInstallDirs_LAST_CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/usr/local
_Python:INTERNAL=PYTHON
//ADVANCED property for variable: boost_atomic_DIR
boost_atomic_DIR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: boost_container_DIR
boost_container_DIR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: boost_filesystem_DIR
boost_filesystem_DIR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: boost_headers_DIR
boost_headers_DIR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: boost_program_options_DIR
boost_program_options_DIR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//True if pybind11 and all required components found on the system
pybind11_FOUND:INTERNAL=TRUE
//Directory where pybind11 headers are located
pybind11_INCLUDE_DIR:INTERNAL=/Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/3rdparty/MeshFEM/3rdparty/pybind11/include
//Directories where pybind11 and possibly Python headers are located
